evaluators.name: LogAnalysisSessionQuality
evaluators.description: Overall log analysis session quality — evidence, accuracy, remediation

llmAsAJudge.instructions: Evaluate the log analysis session holistically. Did the agent query CloudWatch before making claims? Did it cite timestamps and log evidence? Did it avoid hallucinating log entries? Did it provide actionable remediation? Context: {context}

numerical.label: Poor
numerical.definition: Hallucinated data or missed critical errors

evaluators.name: LogAnalysisTraceAccuracy
evaluators.description: Per-turn response accuracy for log analysis answers

llmAsAJudge.instructions: Rate the accuracy of this log analysis response. Is it evidence-backed? Does it correctly interpret CloudWatch results? Context: {context}. Assistant turn: {assistant_turn}

evaluators.name: CloudWatchToolUsage
evaluators.description: Correctness of CloudWatch tool selection and usage

llmAsAJudge.instructions: Evaluate whether the agent selected the correct CloudWatch tool with appropriate parameters. For discovery use list_log_groups; for aggregation use query_logs_insights; for quick triage use filter_log_events; for automated scans use detect_error_patterns; for RCA timelines use build_incident_timeline. Context: {context}. Available tools: {available_tools}. Tool turn: {tool_turn}

categorical.label: Suboptimal
categorical.definition: Works but a better tool exists

onlineEvalConfigs.name: LogAnalysisQualityMonitor
onlineEvalConfigs.description: Continuous quality monitoring for log analysis agent (25% sampling). Enable manually after deploy succeeds.
